pom.xml.general_idea: Add AssertJ dependency for fluent assertions in tests.
Add Checkstyle plugin to enforce code style rules during the build.
Add JaCoCo plugin to generate code coverage reports.
Remove obsolete plugin management and reporting sections that are no longer needed or compatible.

src/main/java/util/Main.java.general_idea: Adopt Java 17 switch expression syntax for argument parsing.

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Refactor class from static state to instance-based state to support multiple independent statistics contexts.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.before: public static BigDecimal minInt, maxInt, sumInt = BigDecimal.valueOf(0), avgInt;

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Replace boolean flags for initialization with null checks on the value fields themselves.
Consolidate separate processing methods for integers, decimals, and strings into a single unified method using a switch statement.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.before: public static void processInteger(String string, boolean shouldProceed) { ... }
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.after: public void processStringForStatistics(String string, boolean shouldProceed, Type type) { ... switch (type) ... }

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Extract min/max calculation logic for decimals into a dedicated helper method to reduce duplication.
Extract min/max calculation logic for integers into a dedicated helper method to reduce duplication.
Extract min/max calculation logic for string lengths into a dedicated helper method to reduce duplication.
Rename output methods from 'writeStatistics' to 'printStatisticsForEachType' to better reflect their console output purpose.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.before: private static void writeStatistics(Number min, Number max, Number sum, Number avg)
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.after: private void printStatisticsForEachType(Number min, Number max, Number sum, Number avg)

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Rename short statistics method to 'printShortStatistics' for consistency with other print methods.
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.before: public static void getShortStatistics(List<String> strings, List<String> floats, List<String> ints)
src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.after: public void printShortStatistics(List<String> strings, List<String> floats, List<String> ints)

src/main/java/util/Statistics.java.general_idea: Rename full statistics method to 'getFullStatistics' (keeping name but changing signature/implementation context) and move it to the top of the class.
Change string length fields from primitive int to Integer object to allow null checks for initialization state.
